examples: Neglect, dilapidation, storm and fire have gradually reduced it to a rusting hulk, like the rib-cage of a whale.
The current status quo of recent development in the city however has unfortunately seen to the dilapidation of Wudadao.
Only so, can the forepart dilapidation of the asphalt road surface be decrease radically to improve the road quality entirely.
He began to see their dilapidation as an advantage: Anything he painted on them inherited the patina of past centuries.
For now, however, part of the allure of Shanghai for Deco aficionados is the general dilapidation of many buildings, which can give explorers the feeling at times of unearthing architectural fossils.
